title: Messaging Outcomes, Delivery Claims, and Evidence · Inference Brief: Outcome Evidence Contract
summary: A team calls every background task reliable pub/sub, promises exactly-once delivery, and reports publish calls instead of stakeholder, ownership, loss, duplicate, latency, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Add and verify the outcome evidence contract increment in messaging outcome, delivery claim, and evidence charter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define producer, consumer, operator, security, accessibility, latency, loss, duplicate, and recovery evidence for one messaging outcome.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Outcome Evidence Contract · Theory Outcome Evidence Contract
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory messaging team handles case 2269 in a recovery drill with stale callbacks from an old channel generation. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to separate local publish, broker ownership, and observable stakeholder effect; record causal telemetry without message IDs as metric labels; then change one routing segment and prove the exact destination set. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Outcome Evidence Contract contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Outcome Evidence Contract · Theory Outcome Evidence Contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for define producer, consumer, operator, security, accessibility, latency, loss, duplicate, and recovery evidence for one messaging outcome. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Outcome Evidence Contract · Theory Outcome Evidence Contract, keep Outcome Evidence Contract connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Build Outcome Evidence Contract evidence · Theory Outcome Evidence Contract
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-TypeScript function headed "// Evidence: rabbit-ts-outcome-evidence-contract-6sixxb" that uses case 6141 to separate local publish, broker ownership, and observable stakeholder effect. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import amqplib or Node built-ins, open sockets, contact RabbitMQ, Docker, networks, databases, or external effects, read host state, or use credentials; verify those boundaries later with the named Node 24, amqplib 2.0.1, RabbitMQ 4.3, TLS, partition, restart, load, upgrade, and production transfer gates.
